text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After a fierce battle, Winning Ticket<n>comes out on
top at the Japanese<n>Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Everyone celebrates the racer for<n>finally fulfilling
her dream. It's a<n>dazzling sight for Narita Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
But she's not one to settle for<n>anything but first
place.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin reaffirms her dedication<n>to keep
pushing on, so she can seize<n>victory at the final
race of the Triple<n>Crown tour—the Kikuka Sho.
